user.title: Connect to Talos
user.description: Paste your talosconfig. The connection endpoint is read from it, and apid discovers the rest of the cluster.

data.endpoint: Endpoint override (optional; defaults to the talosconfig)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Talos
reauth_confirm.description: The certificate expired or rotated. Paste a current talosconfig for the same cluster.

data.endpoint: Endpoint override (optional; defaults to the talosconfig)
Endpoint override (optional; defaults to the talosconfig)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach apid at that endpoint and port.
error.invalid_auth: The certificate was rejected, or its role is not allowed.
error.invalid_config: The talosconfig could not be parsed.
error.missing_dependency: A required Python dependency is missing.

abort.wrong_cluster: That talosconfig is for a different cluster.

data.allow_destructive: Allow destructive operations (reboot, upgrade, apply config)

data_description.allow_reset: Separate gate for the one action that destroys a node. Leave off unless you mean it.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force an immediate poll of the cluster.

get_service_status.name: Get service status
get_service_status.description: Return the Talos service health for a node.

config_entry_id.name: Cluster
config_entry_id.description: The Talos cluster the node belongs to.

reboot_node.name: Reboot node
reboot_node.description: Reboot a single Talos node. Requires destructive operations to be enabled.

config_entry_id.name: Cluster
config_entry_id.description: The Talos cluster the node belongs to.

confirm_node.name: Confirm node
confirm_node.description: Repeat the node address to confirm.

upgrade_node.name: Upgrade node
upgrade_node.description: Upgrade a node's Talos version, preserving its schematic. Requires destructive operations to be enabled.

config_entry_id.name: Cluster
config_entry_id.description: The Talos cluster the node belongs to.

confirm_node.name: Confirm node
confirm_node.description: Repeat the node address to confirm.

version.name: Version
version.description: Target Talos version. Defaults to the configured upgrade target.

apply_config.name: Apply machine config
apply_config.description: Apply a Talos machine configuration to a node. Requires destructive operations to be enabled.

config_entry_id.name: Cluster
config_entry_id.description: The Talos cluster the node belongs to.

confirm_node.name: Confirm node
confirm_node.description: Repeat the node address to confirm.

config.name: Machine config
config.description: The machine configuration YAML to apply.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Apply mode. STAGED applies on next reboot.

reset_node.name: Reset node
reset_node.description: Wipe and reset a node. Requires node reset to be enabled. This is destructive.

config_entry_id.name: Cluster
config_entry_id.description: The Talos cluster the node belongs to.

confirm_node.description: Repeat the node address to confirm.
